title: VisionVault System Architecture

components.Ingestion Gateway: FastAPI WebSocket gateway handling H.264 frame ingestion and clients connections.
components.Message Broker: Redis Queue managing frame distribution to Vision worker pools, acting as a rate limiter and buffer.
components.Inference Engine: Dockerized Python workers hosting Florence-2 and Grounding DINO, utilizing TensorRT runtime compilation for GPU acceleration.
components.Vector Database: ChromaDB indexing spatial/text features extracted from video frames for semantic natural language video search.
components.Storage: MinIO S3-compatible store caching keyframes, events metadata saved in PostgreSQL.

data_flow: IP Camera streams H.264 frames to FastAPI Gateway via WebSocket.
Gateway downsamples frames and pushes them into Redis stream queues.
Worker instances dequeue frames and run concurrent inference using Grounding DINO for tracking and Florence-2 for captioning.
Extracted text descriptions are embedded using all-MiniLM-L6-v2 and stored in ChromaDB alongside coordinates.
Client dashboard receives live detections and bounding boxes via client WebSockets.
